title: Meta commits to spending additional $21 billion with CoreWeave as AI costs keep rising
summary: Meta is committing an additional $21 billion to CoreWeave for AI infrastructure deployment from 2027 to 2032, reflecting escalating capital requirements for advanced AI development. This massive investment underscores how critical and expensive computational resources have become in the competitive AI landscape.
content: Meta's additional spending commitments with CoreWeave will be deployed from 2027 to 2032.

zh.title: Meta承诺额外投入210亿美元与CoreWeave合作，因AI成本持续上升
zh.summary: Meta承诺从2027年到2032年额外投入210亿美元用于与CoreWeave合作的AI基础设施部署，反映了先进AI开发对资本需求的不断增加。这项巨大投资强调了计算资源在竞争激烈的AI领域中已经变得多么关键和昂贵。

title: Meta's long-awaited AI model is finally here. But can it make money?
summary: Meta has released its first major AI model in a year, but now faces the critical challenge of converting this technology into a profitable business. The success of Meta's AI strategy depends on finding viable monetization paths for the model.
content: After releasing its first major AI model in a year, Meta now has to figure out how to turn it into a business.

zh.title: Meta期待已久的AI模型终于推出。但它能赚钱吗？
zh.summary: Meta发布了一年来的首个重大AI模型，但现在面临将这项技术转化为盈利业务的关键挑战。Meta的AI战略成功取决于为该模型找到可行的变现路径。

title: Oil prices tick higher but stay below $100 a barrel on concerns about a ‘fragile’ cease-fire
summary: Oil prices have risen but remain below $100 per barrel as traders worry the Iran ceasefire is unstable and shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted. The cautious market sentiment reflects uncertainty about whether the geopolitical truce will hold and normalize global energy supplies.
content: Traders wary that traffic through the Strait of Hormuz is still restricted.

zh.title: 由于对"脆弱"停火的担忧，油价小幅上升但仍保持在每桶100美元以下
zh.summary: 由于交易员担心伊朗停火不稳定且霍尔木兹海峡的海运仍受限制，油价已上升但仍保持在每桶100美元以下。谨慎的市场情绪反映了对地缘政治休兵是否能够维持并恢复全球能源供应正常化的不确定性。

title: JPMorgan upgrades a key financial stock that has gotten hit in 2026
summary: JPMorgan upgraded Capital One Financial, citing the bank's attractive valuation after a 2026 decline and its demonstrated ability to manage a weakening consumer environment. The upgrade reflects confidence in the company's financial resilience despite economic headwinds.
content: The bank upgraded its rating on Capital One Financial, citing its cheaper valuation after a fall in 2026 and ability to manage a potentially weaker consumer.

zh.title: 摩根大通上调在2026年表现不佳的关键金融股
zh.summary: 摩根大通上调第一资本财务公司，引用该银行在2026年下跌后的吸引力估值及其在应对消费环境恶化方面的能力。此次上调反映了对该公司在经济逆风中财务复原力的信心。

title: Family offices piled into oil after capital dried up. The recent rally has made for big gains
summary: Ultra-wealthy family offices have significantly increased oil and gas investments as ESG pressures drove traditional private equity firms away from the sector. The recent surge in oil prices has generated substantial returns for these family office investors.
content: After ESG pressures forced private equity investors out of oil and gas, investment firms of ultra-wealthy families stepped up.

zh.title: 资本枯竭后家族办公室大举涌入石油市场。近期反弹带来巨大收益
zh.summary: 由于环保、社会和治理压力将传统私募股权公司赶出该行业，超富有家族办公室显著增加了石油和天然气投资。最近油价的飙升为这些家族办公室投资者带来了可观的回报。

title: These signals will make or break the Iran cease-fire — and oil prices
summary: The stability of the Trump-Iran truce remains uncertain, with key signals determining whether the ceasefire holds and how dramatically oil markets will respond. Investors should be prepared to adjust positions in oil and emerging market stocks as the geopolitical situation develops.
content: Ride the “war’s over” rally — but the reality of the Trump-Iran truce suggests being ready to sell oil and emerging markets.

zh.title: 这些信号将决定伊朗停火是否成败——以及油价
zh.summary: 特朗普-伊朗休战的稳定性仍不确定，关键信号将决定停火是否能维持以及石油市场的反应幅度。投资者应准备好根据地缘政治局势的发展调整石油和新兴市场股票的头寸。

title: ‘Our FICO score is excellent’: My husband and I are in our 70s. How do we raise $10,000 for a new roof?
summary: A retired couple with strong credit seeks financing options for a $10,000 roof replacement while managing existing debt including a $30,000 home equity line and $15,000 car loan. The article addresses financial strategies for seniors with limited income seeking to fund home improvements.
content: “We currently have a home equity line of credit in the amount of $30,000 and a car loan of $15,000.”

zh.title: "我们的FICO信用评分很好"：我和丈夫都在70多岁。我们如何筹集1万美元来更换屋顶？
zh.summary: 一对信用良好的退休夫妇正在寻求融资方案来进行1万美元的屋顶更换，同时处理现有债务，包括3万美元的房屋净值信用额度和1.5万美元的汽车贷款。该文章讨论了收入有限的老年人为家庭改善提供资金的财务策略。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, CoreWeave and more
summary: Multiple stocks including Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, and CoreWeave are showing significant premarket volatility. This market movement reflects varied investor sentiment across beverages, software, energy, and AI infrastructure sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum、CoreWeave等
zh.summary: 包括Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum和CoreWeave在内的多只股票显示出显著的盘前波动。这一市场走势反映了投资者对饮料、软件、能源和人工智能基础设施部门的不同看法。

title: Buy this semiconductor maker as AI data center boom continues, Stifel says
summary: Investment firm Stifel upgraded a semiconductor manufacturer to buy from hold, citing continued expansion of AI data center demand. The chipmaker stands to benefit from sustained capital spending by technology companies building AI infrastructure.
content: The investment firm upgraded the chipmaker to buy from hold.

zh.title: 随着AI数据中心热潮持续，Stifel建议买入这家半导体制造商
zh.summary: 投资公司Stifel将一家半导体制造商从持有升级为买入，理由是AI数据中心需求持续扩张。这家芯片制造商将受益于科技公司在构建AI基础设施上的持续资本支出。

title: Will UK petrol and diesel prices start going down?
summary: UK fuel prices have risen due to Middle East tensions, but the Iran ceasefire could trigger a decline in petrol and diesel costs. Consumer relief at the pump depends on whether the truce stabilizes and global oil supplies normalize.
content: UK petrol prices have risen because of the US-Israel war with Iran but the ceasefire could see prices drop.

zh.title: 英国汽油和柴油价格会开始下降吗?
zh.summary: 英国燃料价格因中东局势紧张而上升,但伊朗停火可能会导致汽油和柴油成本下降。消费者在加油站的价格缓解取决于停火是否稳定以及全球石油供应是否恢复正常。

title: You think Iran is only about oil? No, it’s also about your dinner table.
summary: The Iran situation extends beyond oil markets to affect global food prices through four key economic pressures on investor portfolios. Rising grocery costs could materialize later in 2026 as supply chain and inflation impacts take hold.
content: Four chokeholds are squeezing investor portfolios. Here’s what to do before your grocery bill proves it in October.

zh.title: 你认为伊朗只与石油有关?不,它也关乎你的餐桌。
zh.summary: 伊朗局势超越石油市场,通过对投资者投资组合的四个关键经济压力影响全球食品价格。随着供应链和通胀影响的到来,杂货成本的上升可能在2026年晚些时候实现。

title: OpenAI halts UK stargate project amid regulatory and energy price concerns
summary: OpenAI has paused its UK Stargate AI infrastructure project, originally announced in September with Nvidia and Nscale as partners, due to regulatory challenges and energy cost concerns. The halt reflects growing scrutiny of massive AI infrastructure investments in the UK.
content: The major AI infrastructure was announced in September in partnership was with Nvidia and Nscale.

zh.title: OpenAI因监管和能源价格担忧暂停英国星际之门项目
zh.summary: OpenAI已暂停其英国星际之门AI基础设施项目,该项目最初在9月宣布,与Nvidia和Nscale为合作伙伴,由于监管挑战和能源成本担忧。这一暂停反映了对英国大规模AI基础设施投资日益增长的审查。

title: Citi backs European bank stocks after 'overblown' sell off - here are its top three picks
summary: Citigroup recommends European bank stocks following a significant recent selloff, arguing the market decline has been excessive. The Stoxx 600 Banks index is down modestly year-to-date but fell sharply during recent conflict before recovering.
content: The Stoxx 600 Banks index is down 1% year-to-date, after falling by as much as 10% during the depths of the conflict.

zh.title: 花旗在"过度"抛售后看好欧洲银行股 - 以下是其三大精选
zh.summary: 花旗集团在近期大幅抛售后推荐欧洲银行股，认为市场下跌幅度过大。Stoxx 600银行指数年初至今小幅下跌，但在最近冲突期间大幅下跌后随后回升。

title: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn doesn't rule out the 2030 games: 'I would only do it if I could be fast'
summary: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn has indicated she would consider competing in the 2030 Winter Olympics at age 45 if she remains capable of performing at a competitive level. Her potential return reflects her enduring athleticism and drive to remain elite.
content: Lindsey Vonn told CNBC Sport she's not ruling out a return to the Olympics in 2030, at age 45, if she can still perform at a high level.

zh.title: 奥运滑雪选手林赛·冯不排除参加2030奥运：'只要我还够快就会参加'
zh.summary: 奥运滑雪选手林赛·冯表示，如果她仍能保持竞争水平的表现能力，她会考虑在45岁时参加2030年冬奥会。她可能的回归反映了她持久的运动能力和保持精英地位的动力。

title: Lidl begins building its first ever pub
summary: German grocery chain Lidl is constructing its first pub in Northern Ireland, an unusual business expansion driven by the region's strict alcohol licensing laws. The venture represents an unconventional consequence of local regulatory requirements.
content: The development is an unusual consequence of Northern Ireland's strict licensing laws.

zh.title: 利德尔开始建设其有史以来第一家酒吧
zh.summary: 德国杂货连锁店利德尔正在北爱尔兰建设其首家酒吧，这是由该地区严格的酒精许可法驱动的不寻常业务扩展。该企业代表了当地监管要求的非常规后果。

title: Oil prices rise as traders eye fragile US-Iran ceasefire
summary: Oil prices fell on Wednesday following the announcement of a US-Iran ceasefire deal that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global crude supply route. This matters because disruptions to the strait significantly impact energy markets and global trade.
content: The cost of crude plunged on Wednesday after a deal was announced that includes the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油价上涨，交易员关注美伊脆弱停火协议
zh.summary: 美伊停火协议宣布后，油价于周三下跌，该协议包括重新开放霍尔木兹海峡这一关键的全球原油供应路线。这很重要，因为海峡中断会对能源市场和全球贸易产生重大影响。

title: Europe stocks rebound to stall as U.S-Iran ceasefire comes under strain
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed results as the recently agreed US-Iran ceasefire already shows signs of strain. This matters because geopolitical tensions significantly impact financial markets and investor confidence.
content: Shares in Europe are poised to open in mixed territory on Thursday, as the fragile truce agreed between the U.S. and Iran already shows signs of strain.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议面临压力，欧洲股市反弹停滞
zh.summary: 随着最近达成的美伊停火协议已经出现压力迹象，欧洲股市预期将以混合结果开盘。这很重要，因为地缘政治紧张局势对金融市场和投资者信心产生重大影响。

title: The food waste 'saints' feeding city's children
summary: Volunteers at the I Am Reusable food bank redistribute surplus food to schools, addressing food insecurity and waste in their community. This matters as a grassroots solution to childhood food security and environmental sustainability.
content: Janet Leng and Marian Hodgson volunteer at I Am Reusable food bank and redistribute food to schools.

zh.title: 食物浪费的"圣人"喂养城市儿童
zh.summary: "我是可重用"食物银行的志愿者将剩余食物重新分配给学校，解决其社区中的食物不安全和浪费问题。这很重要，因为这是一个解决儿童粮食安全和环保持续性的基层解决方案。

title: From war to weather: A 'super El Niño' event poses fresh risks to global food costs
summary: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could emerge later in 2026, potentially worsening global food security and raising food costs. This matters because climate patterns directly impact agricultural production and food accessibility worldwide.
content: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could take shape later this year, exacerbating global food security fears.

zh.title: 从战争到天气：强劲的厄尔尼诺事件对全球粮食成本构成新风险
zh.summary: 异常强劲的厄尔尼诺气候事件可能在2026年晚些时候出现，可能导致全球粮食安全恶化并提高粮食成本。这很重要，因为气候模式直接影响农业生产和全球粮食获取。

title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
summary: President Trump warned the military to maintain presence near Iran one day after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, signaling potential continued tensions. This matters because it raises questions about the durability of the diplomatic agreement.
content: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国为"下一场征服"做好准备，警告军队在"真实协议"得到兑现之前留在伊朗附近
zh.summary: 在美国和伊朗同意由巴基斯坦斡旋的两周停火协议一天后，特朗普总统警告军队保持在伊朗附近，表明可能继续存在紧张关系。这很重要，因为它引发了对外交协议持久性的质疑。

title: Oil prices resume gains after Iran accuses U.S. of breaching ceasefire deal
summary: Oil prices rose after Iran accused the US of violating elements of their ceasefire agreement, adding uncertainty to the fragile truce. This matters because energy markets are highly sensitive to geopolitical tensions and supply threats.
content: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议后，油价恢复上升
zh.summary: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议的条款后，油价上升，为脆弱的停火增加了不确定性。这很重要，因为能源市场对地缘政治紧张局势和供应威胁高度敏感。

title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
summary: The Iran-related disruption to the Strait of Hormuz is straining Asian economies through rising energy costs and weakening currencies, though analysts believe a repeat of the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis is unlikely. This matters because it shows both real economic impact and structural market differences.
content: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

zh.title: 伊朗油价冲击引发1997年亚洲金融危机的回忆——但为什么历史可能不会重演
zh.summary: 伊朗相关的霍尔木兹海峡中断正在通过不断上升的能源成本和货币贬值来削弱亚洲经济，尽管分析师认为1997年亚洲金融危机不太可能重演。这很重要，因为它展示了真实的经济影响和结构性的市场差异。

title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
summary: President Trump has renewed interest in acquiring Greenland while criticizing NATO, as the Iran conflict has exposed divisions within the security alliance. This matters because it highlights internal tensions affecting Western security cooperation.
content: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

zh.title: "管理不善，冰雪之地"：特朗普再次瞄准格陵兰，伊朗战争加深北约分裂
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在批评北约的同时重新对收购格陵兰表示兴趣，因为伊朗冲突暴露了安全联盟内部的分歧。这很重要，因为它突出了影响西方安全合作的内部紧张关系。

title: Asia markets open mixed as investors assess fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire deal
summary: Iran's parliamentary speaker alleged the U.S. breached the two-week ceasefire agreement, raising concerns about the deal's stability just hours after it was announced as Asian markets responded with mixed trading.
content: Iran's parliamentary speaker charged the U.S. of breaching the terms of the two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗-美国停火协议不稳定，亚洲股市涨跌互现
zh.summary: 伊朗议会主席指责美国违反了为期两周的停火协议，在协议宣布仅几小时后就引发了对协议稳定性的担忧，亚洲股市对此做出了混合的交易反应。

title: Inside India newsletter: Tariffs and Iran war threaten India's $100 billion garments export goal
summary: U.S. tariffs and the Iran conflict have severely impacted India's garment industry, driving up production costs and threatening the sector's $100 billion export target.
content: U.S. tariffs and the Iran war have battered India’s garment industry, raising costs, hitting exports, and dashing hopes of a recovery.

zh.title: 印度快讯：关税和伊朗战争威胁印度1000亿美元服装出口目标
zh.summary: 美国关税和伊朗冲突严重冲击了印度服装业，推高了生产成本，威胁到该行业1000亿美元的出口目标。

title: 22,000 students told to pay back 'mis-sold' maintenance loans
summary: Over 22,000 students have been notified they must repay maintenance and childcare loans because their courses were never eligible for such funding.
content: Those affected have been told their courses were never eligible for maintenance or childcare loans

zh.title: 2.2万名学生被要求偿还"错误推销"的维持贷款
zh.summary: 超过2.2万名学生已被通知，由于其课程从未符合此类贷款的资格，他们必须偿还维持和托儿贷款。
